name: Single Disk Eject
description: Safely eject mounted, ejectable disks on macOS from Coco AI. Ported from the Raycast Single Disk Eject extension by johndturn (MIT).

commands.name: Eject All Ejectable Disks
commands.description: Eject every currently mounted disk that the system reports as ejectable (USB drives, SD cards, external SSDs, mounted disk images, etc.). Internal disks are skipped.

args: osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Finder" to eject (every disk whose ejectable is true)' -e 'end try'
